name: Grilled Steaks W/Garlic Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the barbecue grill until all the coals have an even coat of gray ash.
2. Ensure the steak is at least 1 ½ inches thick.
3. Pat the steak dry with paper towels.
4. Mix together the mustard, wine, and black pepper.
5. Spread about two‑thirds of this mixture on both sides of the steak.
6. Grill the steaks 5–6 inches from the coals, turning once; cook until medium rare (approximately 25 minutes total).
7. In a heavy skillet, heat the butter and garlic over medium-low heat for 10 minutes.
8. Add the bread crumbs and toast them, stirring occasionally.
9. Brush any remaining mustard mixture onto the cooked steak.
10. Press the toasted crumbs evenly over the top and sides of the steak.
11. Sprinkle with parsley.
12. Serve sliced into half‑inch pieces.
